faqs.question: Can I use AI to summarize turning proposal notes into a polished client deck into a usable recap?
faqs.answer: Yes, but the recap should still be checked against the original notes. Gamma is the best first pass for a structured recap, AdCreative.ai is useful when you want a different summary angle, and HyperWrite helps turn rough notes into a cleaner client version.

faqs.question: Which AI tool is better for action items?
faqs.answer: Gamma is the better starting point when action items need to stay close to the source notes. Use AdCreative.ai when you need a source-backed follow-up or a second look.

faqs.question: Is Gamma better than AdCreative.ai for client recaps?
faqs.answer: Gamma is better when you already have notes from the meeting; AdCreative.ai is better when the recap needs more context or a broader source check.

faqs.question: What should I avoid before I send the recap?
faqs.answer: Do not send the recap until commitments, dates, owners, and next steps are confirmed. That is the fastest way to keep the summary useful.

finalVerdict: For freelancers, start by testing Gamma on one realistic assignment: turning proposal notes into a polished client deck. Compare it with AdCreative.ai if you need a different workflow, use HyperWrite for the final review, and choose only after checking actual output, setup effort, and current official plan details.
